shared_case_surface: bounded change cases that keep separate outcome evidence, path evidence, combined reading, and failure-versus-readout distinctions inspectable on the same outcome-versus-path surface
bounded_replacement_rule: A local repo may replace the concrete cases only if it preserves the same outcome-versus-path split question, keeps the visible outcome and path evidence jointly inspectable, and still covers strong outcome with weak path, weak outcome with strong path, strong-strong, weak-weak, and materially divergent mixed cases without collapsing the split into one generic workflow score or one hard-coded ideal trace.
public_safe_requirements: a bounded outside reviewer can inspect both outcome and path evidence directly
separate outcome and path readings remain visible before any combined reading
combined reading stays downstream of the separate notes
the public readout stays weaker than the separate outcome and path evidence
